response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack and cross-platform experience but lacks demonstrable deep expertise in Java/Kotlin, JVM internals, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE tooling — key requirements for the role. Their Java exposure is minimal and historical, with no evidence of working on IDE subsystems, language tooling, or application server integration.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems engineering background across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer-focused projects
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or substantial experience with Java/Kotlin or JVM tooling
Lacks demonstrated work with Spring, Hibernate, or enterprise build/runtime systems
IDE internals and language server protocols are not mentioned or evidenced
